steps.title: Spot the second verb and its tense
steps.content: The blank completes a pair of actions joined by “and”: she [blank] her fingers across the harp strings and creates a radiant sound. The second verb creates is simple present, 3rd person singular. Both actions share the same subject, she.

steps.title: Match the verb form to the subject and tense
steps.content: Sweeps is simple present, 3rd person singular—matching both she and the tense of creates. Choice A lacks the 3rd person ending, B uses a plural form that doesn't match “she,” and C shifts to past tense. That matches choice D — D is correct.
